index.heroTitle: Cardiac monitoring for your patients, simplified
index.heroLead: petsFollow Pro centralises heart rate readings, client records and secure messaging in one tool built for veterinary practices.

heartrate.title: Guided heart rate readings
heartrate.text: Clients take BPM readings from the mobile app. You validate and track progress.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.text: Get notified immediately for tachycardia or detected anomalies.

messaging.title: Built-in messaging
messaging.text: Communicate with clients without leaving the platform. Configurable availability.

free.title: Free for vets
free.text: No practice subscription. petsFollow Pro is free for veterinary professionals.

security.title: Secure data
security.text: Compliant hosting, role-restricted access, encrypted messaging.

onboarding.title: Quick onboarding
onboarding.text: Register in 2 minutes, set up your practice profile on first access.

index.ctaText: The app is {free}. Your clients only pay for their pets' cardiac monitoring subscription.
index.productsLead: Three simple plans per pet — all features included once the subscription is active.

monthly.title: Monthly
monthly.text: Flexibility — checks, messaging, timeline, Care/Horse reminders, household view. No long commitment.

annual.title: Annual
annual.text: ≈ €2.9 / month — same full monitoring, better price than monthly.

products.seoDescription: petsFollow subscription grid for veterinary practice presentations.
products.title: petsFollow offers
products.lead: Present vet-prescribed cardiac monitoring to your clients — no collar or device.
products.positioning: petsFollow Pro is free for the practice. Only the owner pays for their pets' monitoring. All features are included once the subscription is active.
products.includedLead: Whatever the plan (monthly, annual or triennial), owners get:
included: Guided heart-rate checks 15 / 30 / 60 s from the mobile app (no hardware)
Sessions sent to and validated by the practice
Secure client ↔ vet messaging + push notifications
Care reminders (standard, meds, custom) and equine pack if horse
Languages FR / NL / EN / ES / ET
products.plansLead: One subscription per monitored pet. Prices TTC. Monthly = Stripe subscription only; annual and triennial = one-time or subscription.
products.plansTip: Tip: lead with Triennial (€95 / 3 years ≈ €2.6/month). Monthly offers flexibility; annual the best yearly price.

profileForm.payoutHint: Details required to prepare and pay your commission statements.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: These terms govern the use of petsFollow Pro by veterinarians and the mobile app by pet owners. The app enables heart rate measurement, history review and communication with the practice. Subscription and addon payments are processed by Stripe. Contact: support{'@'}ll-it-sc.be.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: petsFollow processes personal data to provide animal cardiac monitoring: identity (name, email), pet data (name, species, breed, photos), heart rate readings (animal health data), messages and media with the practice, notification tokens (Firebase Cloud Messaging), payment data processed by Stripe. Purposes: account, monitoring, messaging, notifications, billing. Partners: Google (Sign-In, FCM), Stripe, Google Cloud Platform hosting. Retention: account lifetime or 3 years of inactivity. GDPR rights: mobile app settings (Profile → Delete account), or support{'@'}ll-it-sc.be.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.body: Publisher: LL-IT-SC / petsFollow. Contact: support{'@'}ll-it-sc.be. Hosting: Google Cloud Platform (GDPR-compliant).

prospects.title: Prospect sheets
prospects.subtitle: BCE directory and CRM sheets — search, filters and pagination.

commissions.title: My commissions
commissions.subtitle: Plan-based rates on ex-VAT (8 / 8 / 12%) — push triennial.
commissions.ibanBanner: Enter your IBAN to receive your commissions.

pitch.title: Sales aid
pitch.subtitle: Pick an audience, then present the offer and pricing.
pitch.vetGrid: Vet: 7% → 12% ex-VAT by paying-client volume, with plan factor (monthly / annual / triennial).
pitch.addons: No addons — commissions on plans only (8% monthly / 8% annual / 12% triennial).
mobileFeatures: Stripe subscriptions per pet (monthly / annual / triennial)
All features included once the subscription is active
pitch.commercialFlat: Sales: 8% / 8% / 12% ex-VAT by plan (monthly / annual / triennial); ~€9.4 on the €95 TTC triennial plan.
pitch.cardVetDesc: Clinic pitch: Pro app, client pricing and vet payouts.
pitch.cardClientDesc: Owner pitch: mobile app and pet plans (monthly, annual, triennial).

commissionSheet.htvaNote: Commissions are calculated on the ex-VAT amount (BE VAT 21%). Client/Stripe prices are TTC.
commissionSheet.leadVet: Your earnings: progressive grid by client volume and plan.
commissionSheet.leadCommercial: Your introducer commissioning, plus the vet grid for co-selling pitches.
commissionSheet.leadAdmin: Full model overview: vet + sales + SPIFF bonuses + margin guardrails.
commissionSheet.vetBaseExplain: Base rate by number of paying clients linked to your practice:
commissionSheet.vetMaxExplain: This base rate is then multiplied by a plan factor (100% on Triennial, 67% on Monthly and Annual), then capped at 12%. The table shows the maximum at the 61+ clients tier — your actual rate may be lower on earlier tiers.
commissionSheet.vetAddonNote: Add-ons (Family / Kennel / Care+ / Horse) are no longer sold — legacy only.
commissionSheet.coSellNote: Vets are not penalised when you are assigned — win-win co-selling.
commissionSheet.adminGuardrails: Guardrails: net margin ≥ 55% of TTC · core net/year ≥ €17 · max partner take rate 24% HT.

bonusHints.vet_tier_31: €50 one-shot when first reaching 31 paying clients.
bonusHints.commercial_ramp: €25 when 5 paid pets activate within 60 days under an assigned vet.
bonusHints.commercial_mix: €50 / month if ≥ 55% of the month’s activations are triennial.

commissionSheet.discountNote: Indicative € amounts use full catalogue pricing (household discounts removed).
